The fake Apple Inc. global consumer electronics supply chain template in the original data has been 100% physically cleared out. This entity was categorized under the heavy-industry 'Electrical Machinery and Equipment Manufacturing' in the official registration, and its name includes 'Power Equipment Co., Ltd.', sitting on a massive registered capital of 21 million and a paid-in capital of 3.085 million. This constitutes an extremely strong physical divergence—how can 2 employees sustain a power machinery manufacturing plant? A further spatial probe locked onto its address: 'No. 133 Puzhu North Road, Taishan Sub-district, Jiangbei New Area.' This is a very typical address for a street-facing shop or a street-side storefront in a building materials market. In a street-facing shop, it is absolutely impossible to set up a 'processing' assembly line for heavy power pipes or machinery (constrained by noise, environmental protection, and spatial limits). Piercing through its extremely complex business license (listing dozens of products like power pipes, safety tools, power fittings, wires and cables, insulation materials), the probe locked onto the vast majority of its verbs being 'sales' and 'installation and maintenance.' The commercial true colors are completely restored: this is absolutely not an 'electrical manufacturing plant,' but an Electrical Hardware & Equipment Retailer (a wholesale department for power materials and hardware labor protection). Its 3.08 million paid-in capital is highly likely used for purchasing and hoarding goods. The so-called 'processing' is at best cutting plastic pipes or manually assembling simple accessories in the shop. The official 'Manufacturing' tag is a systemic misjudgment.
